program.name: Family Planning Program
program.description:
The Family Planning Program provides free or low-cost care at clinics in Texas. Services include birth control, pregnancy testing, STI and HIV testing, and cancer screenings. Care for some common health conditions is also covered. Abortion services are not included.

You receive services in person at a participating clinic. There is no benefit card or renewal paperwork. Copays are low, and clinics will not turn you away if you cannot pay.

Minors need consent from a parent or guardian. Some people with private insurance may still qualify. This includes people with a high deductible or who need care kept private.

There is no online application. Find a participating clinic and make an appointment. They will check your eligibility when you arrive. Many clinics can see you the same day.
